releases.name: macOS Security Lite v0.1.0
releases.author: auditadmin
releases.body_md:
## AuditToolkit macOS Security Lite — v0.1.0

Read-only macOS host security audit tool. **Developer-ID signed, Apple-notarised, and
stapled** — installs Gatekeeper-clean on any Mac with no override.

### Artifacts
| File | Notes |
| --- | --- |
| `AuditToolkit-macOS-Security-Lite-0.1.0.pkg` | Installer package (notarised + stapled) |
| `AuditToolkit-macOS-Security-Lite-0.1.0.dmg` | Disk image / drag-install (notarised + stapled) |
| `SHA256SUMS` | Integrity checksums |
| `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` | Release docs |

### Trust
Signed by **Developer ID: Michael Churchill (Team ID `ZXPT7W8AST`)**, notarised by Apple.
Verified before release: `spctl --assess --type install` → **accepted, source=Notarized
Developer ID**; `stapler validate` passes on both artifacts.

```bash
sudo installer -pkg AuditToolkit-macOS-Security-Lite-0.1.0.pkg -target /
audittoolkit-macos-security-lite run
```

Completes the v0.1.0 trio alongside Linux Host Lite and Windows Security Lite.
